message:
bench(core): criterion benchmarks for semantic anomaly pipeline (ft-344j8.13)

Seven benchmark groups covering dot_product_simd, normalize_simd,
calibration_buffer, conformal_observe, zscore_observe, entropy_gate,
and the full gated_pipeline. Latency budgets: conformal < 1µs,
entropy gate < 500ns, dot product 384d < 100ns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -318,6 +318,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "wal_throughput"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "semantic_anomaly_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
